name: panel-proxy
description: Panel Proxy scaffold for LAN HTTP mode using Fastify and WebSocket

scripts.dev: env -u PANEL_LOGIN_PASSWORD_HASH -u PANEL_PROXY_API_TOKEN -u PANEL_SESSION_TTL_MS node --watch --env-file=../.env --import tsx src/index.ts
scripts.password:verify: env -u PANEL_LOGIN_PASSWORD_HASH -u PANEL_PROXY_API_TOKEN -u PANEL_SESSION_TTL_MS node --env-file=../.env --import tsx src/verifyPasswordHash.ts
scripts.start: env -u PANEL_LOGIN_PASSWORD_HASH -u PANEL_PROXY_API_TOKEN -u PANEL_SESSION_TTL_MS node --env-file=../.env dist/index.js
